# Liratek POS - Simple Quotation

**Date:**                     

## What you get
- Point of Sale (sales, receipts)
- Inventory & products
- Customers & debts
- Currency exchange
- OMT/Whish services
- Mobile recharge
- Maintenance/repairs tracking
- Daily closing reports
- Multi-user (Admin/Cashier)
- Backup

## Price
### Developer total (software + setup + migration) — **$1,200**
This is the full amount paid to the developer (no hardware included).

### Hardware (optional)
Hardware is paid separately based on the final market price (scanner, printer, cash drawer, paper, etc.).

## Payment
- 50% to start
- 50% on delivery/installation

## Timeline
- Typically **7–9 weeks** (depends on data migration and hardware availability)

## Notes
- Prices in USD (or LBP at market rate)
- Quotation valid for 30 days
